implementation_summary: Updated knowledge base search to use substring/contains matching across topic, title, and content by changing the SQL pattern from prefix-based to wildcard-wrapped matching. No API, schema, or result-shape changes were introduced.
commit_message: SDLC-40: fix knowledge base search to match substrings

changes.change_summary: Changed search wildcard pattern from prefix-only to contains/substring matching for topic, title, and content.
changes.rationale: This is the minimal fix for the reported issue and preserves existing query structure and ordering.

validation_notes: No tests were added because the repository contents provided only the affected service file; the change is limited to the search predicate.
Behavior now matches queries appearing anywhere in topic, title, or content while retaining existing prefix matches.
assumptions: Search is implemented in the database query layer via SQLAlchemy ilike, so updating the wildcard pattern is sufficient.
Existing ordering and filtering should remain unchanged beyond the broader match semantics.
